assertions.title: Dealer list pages use phone-appropriate card layouts

steps.expected: Phone-appropriate layout without desktop-style table scrolling
steps.observed: Page displays 'My Orders' heading with clean mobile layout, no horizontal scrolling. Empty state shows 'No orders found' message clearly.

steps.expected: Phone-appropriate layout without desktop-style table scrolling
steps.observed: Page displays 'My Invoices' heading with clean mobile layout. Empty state shows 'No invoices found' message clearly.

steps.expected: Phone-appropriate layout without desktop-style table scrolling
steps.observed: Page displays 'My Ledger' heading with clean mobile layout. Empty state shows 'No transactions found' message clearly.

steps.expected: Aging bucket view readable on phone
steps.observed: Page displays 'My Aging' heading with aging buckets (Current, 1-30 Days, 31-60 Days, 61-90 Days, 90+ Days) showing ₹0 each. Total Outstanding ₹0 visible. Layout is phone-appropriate with stacked buckets.

steps.action: Check aging overdue section on phone
steps.observed: The 90+ Days bucket is visible and readable. All bucket values display correctly without horizontal scrolling.

assertions.title: Dealer invoice PDF remains usable on phone

steps.expected: Invoices list with PDF actions visible
steps.observed: Page displays 'No invoices found' - no invoices available to test PDF functionality

assertions.issues: Cannot test PDF action behavior because the validation dealer account has no invoices. Need seeded invoice data to test PDF preview/download/open flows on mobile.

assertions.title: Dealer dashboard quick actions remain usable on phone

steps.expected: Dashboard cards and quick actions readable and tappable
steps.observed: Dashboard displays cards for Outstanding Balance (₹0), Available Credit (₹5.00L), Pending Invoices (0), Pending Orders (0), Order Exposure (₹0). Quick action buttons visible: View Invoices, Aging Report, Support, Refresh. All elements fit within phone viewport without horizontal scrolling.
Successfully navigated to /dealer/aging. Quick action is directly tappable and routes to expected screen.

assertions.title: Dealer credit-request flow remains usable on phone

steps.expected: Credit request form readable on phone
steps.observed: Form displays clearly with: 'Requested amount ₹' input field, 'Justification (optional)' textarea, 'Submit request' button. Form inputs are appropriately sized for phone viewport.

steps.action: Fill credit request form (amount: 50000, justification: testing)
steps.observed: Amount field accepts 50000, justification field accepts text. All fields visible and interactable.

Submit button clicked but no request was sent to backend (no network request captured). Form remained on page without error or success feedback. This appears to be backend connectivity issue (backend readiness was DOWN per mission docs), not a frontend mobile layout issue.

evidence.network: No API requests captured - backend may be unavailable

assertions.issues: Form layout and readability PASS. Backend submission could not be verified due to backend unavailability (mission docs note backend readiness is DOWN). The form itself is phone-appropriate and usable.

assertions.title: Dealer support-ticket flow remains usable on phone

steps.expected: Support tickets page readable with New ticket action
steps.observed: Page displays 'Support Tickets' heading with 'New ticket' button and empty state message 'No support tickets yet. Create one if you need help.'

steps.action: Click 'New ticket' button to open form
steps.observed: Form expands inline with: Subject input, Category dropdown (General Support, Bug / Issue, Feature Request), Description textarea, Submit ticket and Cancel buttons. All fields are phone-appropriate.

steps.action: Fill support ticket form (subject, category, description)
steps.observed: All fields populated: Subject 'Mobile validation test ticket', Category 'Bug / Issue', Description filled. Form readable and usable on phone.
Submit action timed out (action on element timed out). Page reverted to base state without showing the created ticket. This appears to be backend connectivity issue, not frontend mobile layout issue.

evidence.network: Submit action timed out - backend may be unavailable

assertions.issues: Form layout and readability PASS. Backend submission timed out due to backend unavailability (mission docs note backend readiness is DOWN). The form itself is phone-appropriate and usable.

blockers.description: Backend readiness is DOWN per mission documentation. Credit request and support ticket submissions do not complete - no network requests captured for credit requests, and support ticket submit timed out.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried submissions multiple times, waited for network idle, checked console for errors. No frontend-side fix possible.

blockers.description: No invoices exist for validation dealer account - cannot test VAL-MOBILE-008 PDF functionality

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-MOBILE-003, VAL-MOBILE-010, VAL-MOBILE-012 layout, VAL-MOBILE-013 layout), 1 blocked (VAL-MOBILE-008 - no invoices to test PDF), 2 partially verified (VAL-MOBILE-012 and VAL-MOBILE-013 - forms readable/usable but backend submission blocked). All mobile layouts are phone-appropriate with no horizontal scrolling required. Dashboard quick actions work correctly. Credit request and support ticket forms are usable on phone but submissions could not be verified due to backend unavailability.
